texto: Other than the love of God
autor: the greatest love is self love. You have to love yourself more than you love someone else in order to succeed in a prosperous life.
explicacao: Citação de the greatest love is self love. You have to love yourself more than you love someone else in order to succeed in a prosperous life. sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Other than the love of God” articula reflexao, barbara-hart, other em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
